resources.string:
This app has no UI of its own. It registers a Locus sensor adapter that exposes any standard BLE Heart Rate strap (Polar, Wahoo, Garmin, Suunto, …) to Locus Map.

To try it:
1. Install Locus Map on this device.
2. In Locus, open the sensor picker and add a sensor.
3. Under "External adapters", pick "Heart rate monitor".
4. Locus scans for your strap and drives the connection; this app only decodes the byte frames.

The parser lives in HrmAdapterService.kt — about 90 lines. Copy this module as the starting point for your own adapter.

Locus shows a "Settings" action on the adapter's picker row, wired here to this screen via getIntentForSettings(). Overriding it is optional — adapters with no settings UI can skip it.
